description: Recommended Arrow/Parquet physical schema for bulk rows carrying selfplay.v1 semantics.
notes: Top-level schema identifies the physical Arrow/Parquet contract; logical_schema identifies the row semantics as selfplay.v1.
Parquet key/value metadata should include physical_schema, logical_schema, logical_contract, contracts_release, and contract_version.
physical_schema must be arrow-parquet-selfplay.v1; logical_schema and logical_contract must be selfplay.v1.
contracts_release and contract_version should match contracts.json.release_version for release artifacts.
contract_version must match contracts.json.release_version for the producing package.
bitboards are the physical board encoding derived from the selfplay.v1 qfen field.
value uses the same side-to-move perspective as selfplay.v1 and stores only -1 or 1.
qfen is optional in production but recommended for debug shards.
write Parquet in batches or shards; do not append one row at a time.
